top.label: Top
top.description: Complex reasoning, coding agents, hard multi-step problems

mid.label: Mid
mid.description: Everyday coding, writing, analysis, RAG, chat

fast.label: Fast / Cheap
fast.description: Simple tasks, summarization, classification, quick answers

rtx5090.name: RTX 5090
rtx5090.notes: Latest consumer GPU, better for 20-35B models

b200.name: B200 180GB
b200.notes: Next-gen, massive VRAM for large models

MODELS.name: Qwen3.5 9B
MODELS.verdictNote: Fits on consumer GPU. Excellent for edge deployment and low-latency apps.

MODELS.name: Qwen3.5 27B
MODELS.verdictNote: Fits on a single RTX 4090 or Mac with 18GB+ unified memory. Best entry point for self-hosting.

MODELS.name: Qwen3.5 35B-A3B
MODELS.verdictNote: Only 3B active params make it very fast. Fits on 24GB GPU at Q4.

MODELS.name: GLM-4.5 Air
MODELS.verdictNote: Budget option. Fits on consumer GPU with 12GB+ VRAM.

MODELS.name: Qwen3.5 122B-A10B
MODELS.architecture: MoE with 256 experts and hybrid gated DeltaNet attention
MODELS.verdictNote: Requires 73-80GB VRAM at Q4 — fits on single H100/A100 80GB. Excellent Sonnet-level quality.

purchaseOptions.name: 2× RTX 3090 (NVLink)
purchaseOptions.canRunModel: Q3 with CPU offload — not recommended

MODELS.name: GLM-4.7
MODELS.architecture: MoE with hybrid attention, agent mode
MODELS.verdictNote: Requires 4× H100 or equivalent. Top-tier Chinese model with excellent coding/reasoning.

MODELS.name: GLM-4.7 Flash
MODELS.architecture: MoE with reasoning mode, 3.6B active params
MODELS.verdictNote: Only 3.6B active params. Fits on single A100 80GB or 24GB GPU + RAM offload.

MODELS.name: MiniMax M2.5
MODELS.architecture: MoE with hybrid attention and multi-token prediction
MODELS.verdictNote: Requires 101GB VRAM at Q3 or 243GB at Q8. Best on 4× H100 or Mac with 128GB+ unified memory.

purchaseOptions.name: Mac Studio M2 Ultra (192GB)
purchaseOptions.canRunModel: Q3 at ~15-25 t/s via MLX — 101GB required

MODELS.name: MiniMax M2.7
MODELS.architecture: Agentic multi-agent collaboration architecture with continuous improvement
MODELS.verdictNote: API-only model. Designed for autonomous workflows and production tasks.

MODELS.name: DeepSeek V3.2
MODELS.verdictNote: 671B total params but only 37B active. Requires 8× H100 for Q4. Best open-weight model.

MODELS.name: DeepSeek R1
MODELS.verdictNote: Reasoning specialist. Same architecture as V3. Requires 8× H100.

MODELS.name: Kimi K2
MODELS.verdictNote: 1T parameter MoE. Requires 247GB+ for Q2. ⚠️ Mac Studio can load at Q2 but runs at ~20 t/s — experimentation only. Production needs 8× H100.

MODELS.name: Kimi K2.5
MODELS.verdictNote: 1T parameter MoE. Requires 240GB+ for Q2 quant. ⚠️ Mac Studio can load at Q1-Q2 but runs at ~20 t/s — experimentation only. Production needs 8× H100/H200.

MODELS.name: GLM-5
MODELS.verdictNote: 744B params, 40B active. Requires 176GB at Q2 or 805GB at Q8. ⚠️ Mac Studio can load at Q1-Q2 but runs at ~20 t/s — experimentation only. Production needs 8× H100/H200.

MODELS.name: GLM-5.1
MODELS.architecture: Large-scale MoE, native agent, multimodal, improved coding
MODELS.verdictNote: 744B params, 40B active. Improved coding performance over GLM-5. Requires 176GB at Q2 or 805GB at Q8. ⚠️ Mac Studio can load at Q1-Q2 but runs at ~20 t/s — experimentation only. Production needs 8× H100/H200.

USAGE_PROFILES.label: Light
USAGE_PROFILES.description: Occasional use — quick questions, short tasks

USAGE_PROFILES.label: Heavy
USAGE_PROFILES.description: Power user — coding all day, long contexts

THESIS_POINTS.title: Models are becoming commodities
THESIS_POINTS.body: Qwen3.5 122B matches Claude Sonnet 4.6 on most benchmarks at $0.20/M input tokens — 15x cheaper. The gap between "frontier" and "open" is closing every 3 months.

THESIS_POINTS.title: Token APIs are a tax on intelligence
THESIS_POINTS.body: Every token you send to Anthropic, OpenAI, or Google is a rent payment on weights you could be running yourself. At scale, this is a 90%+ margin business disguised as infrastructure.

THESIS_POINTS.title: Local is the endgame
THESIS_POINTS.body: Qwen3.5 27B fits on a single RTX 4090 (17GB VRAM at Q4). For high-traffic workloads, local wins.

THESIS_POINTS.title: The race to zero is real
THESIS_POINTS.body: LLM API prices dropped ~80% from 2025 to 2026. The gap between "cheap" and "premium" is now 1,000x. Commodity inference is here.
